activities.title: Drill Diver
activities.desc: I helped develop the 2D speedrunning platformer "Drill Diver" as part of a team for UCF's AI for Game Programming course in Fall 2025. Drill Diver was awarded the "Best Game Design" award.

activities.title: "The Bias is in the Details: An Assessment of Cognitive Bias in LLMs"
activities.desc: I helped develop a custom dataset to measure cognitive bias-like patterns in LLMs. Submitted to TACL in 2025; awaiting final decision.

activities.title: MTU Graduation
activities.desc: I graduated from the Michigan Technological University in May of 2024 with a BS in Computer Engineering and a minor in Psychology.

activities.title: Senior Design Project
activities.desc: I helped build a benchmarking pipeline for proprietary software in Bash, C, and C++. Learn more about the project at the link.
